utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, size, price, school district, features, possession date) – fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, interest rate with term, monthly payment, lender, application fee, bridge financing details) – fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes provider, cost, services, status – fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes provider, cost, services, timeline – fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (utilities package with cost, property survey with cost, home inspection with cost, land transfer tax, total closing costs) – sufficiently specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (price, closing costs, legal, moving, utilities setup, mortgage application, property survey, total project cost, available equity, savings, required mortgage, budget status) – fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are fully covered.
